creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
When I use the py38-jupyterlab-3.1.14 package on an RPi4 board running FreeBSD 13-STABLE, installed using pkg(8), and  connect with a web browser, I get the following message:

[W 2021-12-19 13:19:54.137 LabApp] Could not determine jupyterlab build status without nodejs

I wonder if there is a missing run-time dependency for this port/package on  nodejs?
